about.title: Our Brand Story
about.story: Fashion Comfort Group is an international knitwear manufacturing partner with over 20 years of experience, working with fashion brands that value quality, reliability and responsible production. We operate our own production facility in Bangladesh (ASDWA Fashion Ltd.) and maintain international offices in Barcelona, Prato, Shanghai, and Tokyo.
about.story_text_1: Fashion Comfort Group is an international knitwear manufacturing partner with over 20 years of experience, working with fashion brands that value quality, reliability and responsible production.
about.story_bullet_1: Established production operations in Bangladesh since 2002
about.story_bullet_2: International design, development, sourcing and sales presence
about.story_bullet_3: A manufacturing partner focused on consistency, continuity and stable long-term cooperation
about.why_intro: Brands choose to work with Fashion Comfort Group because we combine product development expertise, direct production control and a long-term partnership approach.
about.why_1: Strong product development and fast sampling capabilities
about.why_2: Direct control over production, quality and leadtimes
about.why_3: Responsible, certified and transparent supply chain
about.why_4: European mindset defining how we develop and manufacture
about.why_5: Product longevity as a core part of our sustainability approach
about.teams_text: Our international teams combine European design sensibility, technical expertise and close client proximity with efficient global sourcing and production
about.teams_prato: Design, yarn expertise and sourcing office
about.sample_text: Our sample home is a core part of our development process, designed to support fast decision-making and efficient product development.
about.sample_1: Dedicated sample building with specialized knitting machines covering multiple gauges and constructions
about.sample_2: Ability to develop multiple samples per day
about.sample_3: Sampling lead times of up to 72 hours
about.sample_6: Close collaboration with clients' design and product teams
about.production_text_1: We operate our own production facility in Bangladesh, ASDWA Fashion Ltd., which is the core of our manufacturing operations.
about.production_text_2: This structure allows us to maintain direct control over quality, processes and production standards at every stage.
about.production_text_3: Our facilities are equipped with modern knitting machinery, supporting a wide range of gauges, constructions and finishing techniques, ensuring a smooth transition from development to bulk production.
about.production_text_4: Our production capacity is primarily driven by our own factory, guaranteeing consistency, reliability and stable lead times.
about.production_text_5: When required by program volume or timing, carefully selected external capacity is used as a supporting resource, always operating under our supervision and quality standards.
about.production_text_6: This approach allows scalable production without compromising control or consistency.
about.production_cap_1: Own production facility: ASDWA FASHION LTD.
about.production_cap_2: Dedicated quality control teams on site
about.production_cap_4: Modern knitting machinery across multiple gauges and constructions
about.production_cap_5: Flexible production planning for seasonal peaks and complex programs

about.responsible_solar: Solar energy generation of up to approximately 1,000 kWh per day
about.responsible_recycle: Recycling processes that convert factory fabric waste into ready-to-use recycled materials
about.responsible_workers: Long-term workforce retention and development programs
about.responsible_text: Responsibility is integrated into our operations and production units, with a focus on measurable actions and continuous improvement
about.certificates_note: All certifications listed are valid and active at the time of publication and subject to regular renewal
about.social_bsci_text: Our manufacturing unit is audited under amfori BSCI and currently holds a Level A rating, reflecting strong performance in social compliance, working conditions and ethical standards.
about.social_env_1: Annual initiative to plant 1,000 trees around our manufacturing unit
about.social_env_3: Ongoing efforts to improve local environmental impact
about.social_worker_1: On-site childcare facility project for workers' children
about.social_worker_2: Dedicated medical support area for employees
about.social_worker_3: Long-term focus on safe, supportive working conditions
about.social_quote: Responsibility is integrated into daily operations, not treated as a separate initiative

founders.title: Our Founders
founders.founder1_desc: Leads the overall strategic direction of the group and oversees investment, compliance, and governance.
founders.founder2_desc: Oversees financial planning, capital structuring, and risk management. Manages banking relationships.
founders.founder3_desc: Focused on coordinating the setup of the regenerated yarn facility, managing stakeholder communication, supporting traceability.
founders.subtitle: The people behind Fashion Comfort Group

timeline.title: Our Journey
timeline.2002: The renowned company FASHION COMFORT (BD) LTD. was founded. Now known as FCBL.
timeline.2003: FCBL started working as a buying agent in Bangladesh with European brands.
timeline.2005: FCBL began working with INDITEX GROUP in men's and children's departments, through MAGLIFICO DIANA.
timeline.2007: Hebei Wilson Textile Co. Ltd (China) & FCBL joint venture started their journey in the field of woolen yarn.
timeline.2011: Beijing Jishida Textile Co. Ltd started their operation in Bangladesh with FCBL as a partner, known as JSD Bangla. FCBL established an R&D division with foreign expertise named FCBL Sample Home.
timeline.2013: SQ CELSIUS and FCBL started working together as partners to produce cashmere and woolen yarn in Bangladesh.
timeline.2016: FCBL and YARNS & COLORS started cooperation in Bangladesh to provide new fancy yarn opportunities. We established a new strategy with ASDWA FASHION LTD, a textile and design institution specialized in traditional yarn.
timeline.2017: FCBL and DEHONG International Cashmere Co., Ltd formed a partnership in cashmere and Joint Life theme, especially in Heavy Knitwear Sector. FCBL opened its own branch office in Barcelona named FASHION COMFORT EUROPE S.L. with European expertise for better communication with Spanish customers and new developments in styling and fashion sector support.
timeline.2018: FCBL started their own production unit known as ASDWA Fashion Ltd., a modern and sustainable high-quality manufacture, 100% export-oriented sweater manufacturing company in Bangladesh with state-of-the-art facilities. Recently added 100 jacquard machines to increase productive capacity and meet growing demand. FCBL acquired the partnership of Titas Sweater Industries Ltd., a 100% certified factory established in 2003. Currently 2,500 workers are employed at this facility.

work.title: Our Work
work.subtitle: Products we've manufactured for leading fashion brands
work.description: Fashion Comfort Group works regularly with leading international brands, manufacturing high-quality knitwear products. Below you can see a selection of products we've produced.
work.no_products: Products coming soon. Run the scraper to populate this section.

lyk.problem_text: Bangladesh's sweater industry generates 15,000+ tons/year of post-industrial waste, most of which is downcycled or underutilized. At the same time, global brands are rapidly shifting toward circular, recycled, and traceable materials, with 40% of their material demand now coming from recycled/circular sources, up from previous single-digit levels. This shift is driven by EU DPP regulations and sustainability commitments.
lyk.solution_text: LYK transforms local textile waste into premium, traceable regenerated fancy yarns. We're not producing bulk recycled yarn—we're creating high-value, batch-preserved, DPP-ready materials that global brands actually want.
lyk.diff_1_text: Waste passports + DPP-ready documentation for every batch
lyk.diff_2_text: Not bulk open-end recycled—high-value specialty yarns
lyk.diff_3_text: Each lot maintains its identity throughout the process
lyk.diff_4_text: From waste collection to finished yarn—all under one roof
lyk.product_1_desc: Irregular, thick-thin effect running along the yarn, popular for sweaters, T-shirts, womenswear.
lyk.product_2_desc: Yarn containing tiny natural knots for a textured, vintage look.
lyk.product_3_desc: Very soft, fluffy surface resembling soft snow; high demand in women's winterwear.
lyk.product_4_desc: Clear loop formation for sweaters, cardigans, scarves.
lyk.matters_1_text: Keep material, knowledge, and economic value within Bangladesh instead of exporting waste
lyk.matters_2_text: Prepare for EU sustainability regulations before compliance becomes mandatory
lyk.matters_3_text: Position Bangladesh beyond garment manufacturing into yarn innovation and sustainability
lyk.mission: Make Bangladesh the world leader in traceable, regenerated yarn by turning textile waste into a billion-dollar circular economy.
lyk.hero_intro: LYK is our circular yarn initiative, transforming post-industrial textile waste into premium, traceable regenerated yarns for global brands.
lyk.upstream_text: direct ownership of material inputs, from collection through yarn spinning
lyk.cta_text: Partner with us to integrate circular, traceable yarns into your supply chain

manufacturing.hero_title: Production with control, not just capacity
manufacturing.hero_sub: Our production facility, ASDWA Fashion Ltd., is at the core of our operations.
manufacturing.hero_text: This allows us to maintain direct control over quality, processes and delivery at every stage — from development to bulk production.
manufacturing.overview_text: We operate a fully integrated knitwear manufacturing facility in Bangladesh, combining modern machinery, experienced teams and structured workflows. Our setup is designed to ensure consistency, scalability and reliable lead times across all programs.
manufacturing.cap_1_text: Over 3 million pieces annually across knitwear categories
manufacturing.cap_3_text: 2,500+ skilled workers across production and technical teams
manufacturing.cap_4_text: Sweaters, cardigans, flat knit and seamless knitwear
manufacturing.cap_5_text: Flexible planning adapted to program complexity and volume
manufacturing.cap_6_text: Direct connection between sample development and bulk production
manufacturing.tech_text: Our facilities are equipped with advanced knitting technology, enabling a wide range of gauges, constructions and finishes. This allows us to translate design concepts into production-ready garments with precision and consistency.
manufacturing.quality_text: Quality is integrated into every stage of our production process, from yarn selection to final inspection.
manufacturing.quality_1_text: Dedicated teams on every production line
manufacturing.quality_2_text: Garments checked before packing and shipment
manufacturing.quality_4_text: Consistency between approved samples and production
manufacturing.model_text: Our production is primarily driven by our own manufacturing facility, ensuring full control and consistency. When required by program scale or timing, selected external capacity supports production under our supervision and quality standards.
manufacturing.model_highlight: Scalable production without compromising control or consistency.
manufacturing.cta_text: Partner with a team that values quality, control and long-term reliability
